title: Shared tensors (tied weights) crash on checkpoint save - RESOLVED
summary: Fixed by creating 32 independent SparseMemoryBank instances (num_layers=1 each) in train_gated_sparse_memory.py. Checkpoint save at step 1000 succeeded at 06:33. Training continued past step 1000 without crash.
root_cause: MemoryBank instances were shared across layers instead of creating a new instance for each layer.
fix_applied: 2026-04-22 05:07 - Modified train_gated_sparse_memory.py to create 32 independent SparseMemoryBank instances (num_layers=1 each). Training relaunched.
validation_result: 2026-04-22 06:33 - Checkpoint-1000 saved successfully to outputs/sparse_memory_concat_fusion_v1_fixed/checkpoint-1000. Training continued without crash. Fix validated.

title: Training process died mysteriously at step ~1300 - RESOLVED
summary: Previous run died at step ~1300. Current run (launched 05:07) has passed step 1463 successfully. Checkpoint-1000 saved successfully (issue_003 fix validated). No recurring crash observed - issue was likely transient or related to the earlier shared tensors bug.
fix_applied: none - current run stable past step 1463
validation_result: 2026-04-22 08:11 - Current run at step 1463, healthy loss trend, no crash.
